fixture.description: getItems() returns the internal mutable List directly, so callers can mutate the cart's private state (clear/add) bypassing the class invariants.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that getItems() returns the internal mutable `items` list reference directly (no defensive copy / unmodifiable wrapper), so external callers can mutate the cart's private state (e.g. getItems().clear()) and break encapsulation/invariants, and recommends returning a copy or Collections.unmodifiableList(...). Severity DEBT, IMPORTANT, or SUGGESTED. FAIL if the leaked-internal-collection / encapsulation issue is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: DRY/Bugs agent flags the exposed internal collection
Recommends defensive copy or unmodifiable view
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT require a caller to be shown mutating it
